research_question: On the same BOF_CONTROL entry set, how much edge is being lost by the current exit semantics?

exit_variants.label: TIGHT_EXIT
exit_variants.notes: Tighter risk guardrail; answers whether baseline edge is being given back too late.

exit_variants.label: LOOSE_EXIT
exit_variants.notes: Looser leash; answers whether current baseline is getting shaken out too early.

exit_variants.label: STOP_ONLY
exit_variants.notes: Disable trailing-stop pressure while keeping the current hard stop distance.

exit_variants.label: TRAIL_ONLY
exit_variants.notes: Disable fixed stop-loss and keep only the current trailing-stop behavior.

results.label: CONTROL_REALIZED
results.notes: Observed BOF_CONTROL path under the current broker-frozen exit semantics.

results.label: TIGHT_EXIT
results.notes: Tighter risk guardrail; answers whether baseline edge is being given back too late.

results.label: LOOSE_EXIT
results.notes: Looser leash; answers whether current baseline is getting shaken out too early.

results.label: STOP_ONLY
results.notes: Disable trailing-stop pressure while keeping the current hard stop distance.

results.label: TRAIL_ONLY
results.notes: Disable fixed stop-loss and keep only the current trailing-stop behavior.
